html:
Exclusive to:

The Malbatross Feather is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is dropped by the Malbatross. It is also possible to obtain Malbatross Feathers by destroying a Sunken Chest. Malbatross Feathers are required to craft the Feathery Canvas. They can also be used to craft a Malbatross Quill Float

Usage

×6

Trivia

  • The Malbatross Feather was introduced in the Salty Dog update.

–Wurt
“I think we ruffled her feathers.”

–Wanda

It is also possible to obtain Malbatross Feathers by destroying a Sunken Chest. Malbatross Feathers are required to craft the Feathery Canvas. They can also be used to craft a Malbatross Quill Float

The '''Malbatross Feather''' is an [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is dropped by the [[Malbatross]]. It is also possible to obtain Malbatross Feathers by destroying a [[Sunken Chest]]. Malbatross Feathers are required to craft the [[Feathery Canvas]]. They can also be used to craft a [[Malbatross Quill Float]]

=={{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Malbatross Feather
|count1 = 6
|item2 = Silk
|count2 = 1
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Feathery Canvas}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Malbatross Feather
|tool = Tackle Receptacle
|result = Malbatross Quill Float}}
{{Clear}}

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Malbatross Feather was introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Version History|Salty Dog]]'' update.
